---
title: "Corrélations fonctionelles - MB-PLS"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
author: "Gaspard Martet - unité EPISABE"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    theme: lumen
    css: "style.css"
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, out.width='100px'}
knitr::include_graphics("C:/Users/g.martet/Documents/Autres/anses.webp")

```

```{r, echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, cache = TRUE}
library(tidyverse)
library(tseries)
library(openxlsx)
library(FactoMineR)
library(factoextra)
library(ggpubr)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(pheatmap)
library(Hmisc)
library(corrplot)
library(DT)
library(ggrepel)
library(devtools)
library(FonctionsUtiles)
library(lmtest)
library(mixOmics)
library(bestNormalize)
library(kableExtra)
library(fda)
library(funData)
library(reshape2)
```

```{r, echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, cache = TRUE}

dat <- openxlsx::read.xlsx("C:/Users/g.martet/Documents/updatedata/dat.xlsx")
dim(dat)

```


```{r, echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}

# récupération des variables séléctionées

selvar_AMR_EHPAD_FQ <- c("log_AMC_EHPAD_C3G", "log_AMC_EHPAD_FQ", "log_AMC_EHPAD_macrolides", "log_AMC_EHPAD_penicillines",    
"log_AMC_EHPAD_tetracyclines", "log_AMC_EHPAD_totale",          
"log_AMC_ES_FQ", "log_AMC_ES_carba", "log_AMC_ES_totale",              "log_AMC_ville_C3G", "log_AMC_ville_FQ", "log_AMC_ville_macrolides",      
"log_AMC_ville_penicillines", "log_AMC_ville_tetracyclines",   
"log_AMC_ville_tmp_sulfa", "log_AMC_ville_totale",          
"log_AMC_EHPAD_tot_except_FQ", "log_AMC_ville_tot_except_FQ",   
"log_i041_pib_hab", "veto_by_AC", "veto_by_CV", "veto_by_carni",                 
"prescri_9_inv", "medecin_hab", "couv_creche", "tx_possession_chats",           
"pop_75_plus_prop", "air_NO2_pop", "air_O3_pop", "air_PM10_pop",                  
"air_PM25_pop", "dju_refroi", "log_UGB_density_bovine_all",     "log_UGB_density_bovins_adultes", "log_UGB_density_livestock_tot",  "log_UGB_density_porcs", "log_UGB_density_veaux", "log_UGB_density_volailles",     
"i007b_part_agribio_surf")


selvar_AMR_ES_FQ <- c("log_AMC_EHPAD_C3G", "log_AMC_EHPAD_FQ", "log_AMC_EHPAD_macrolides", "log_AMC_EHPAD_penicillines",        
"log_AMC_EHPAD_tetracyclines", "log_AMC_EHPAD_tmp_sulfa",           
"log_AMC_EHPAD_totale", "log_AMC_ES_FQ", "log_AMC_ES_carba",                   "log_AMC_ES_totale", "log_AMC_ville_FQ", "log_AMC_ville_macrolides",          
"log_AMC_ville_penicillines", "log_AMC_ville_tetracyclines",       
"log_AMC_ville_tmp_sulfa", "log_AMC_ville_totale",              
"log_AMC_EHPAD_tot_except_FQ", "log_AMC_ES_tot_except_FQ",          
"log_AMC_ville_tot_except_FQ", "EQI_st", "log_i041_pib_hab",                   "prop_travail_manuel", "tx_pauvrete_60", "unemployement_pourc",               
"veto_by_CV", "APL_medG", "medecin_hab", "prop_appart",                       
"couv_creche", "tx_possession_chats", "tx_possession_chevaux",              "tx_possession_chiens", "pop_14_moins_prop", "pop_3_moins_prop",                  
"pop_75_plus_prop", "log_pop_density", "air_NO2_pop",                        "air_O3_pop", "air_PM10_pop", "air_PM25_pop", "dju_refroi",                         "log_i033a_part_class_5_eau_sup_nit", "log_UGB_density_SAU_bovine_all",     "log_UGB_density_bovine_all", "log_UGB_density_bovins_adultes",     "log_UGB_density_livestock_tot", "log_UGB_density_ovins",              "log_UGB_density_porcs", "log_UGB_density_veaux",              "log_UGB_density_volailles")

selvar_AMR_ville_FQ <- c("log_AMC_EHPAD_C3G", "log_AMC_EHPAD_FQ", "log_AMC_EHPAD_aminoglycosides", "log_AMC_EHPAD_macrolides", "log_AMC_EHPAD_penicillines", "log_AMC_EHPAD_tmp_sulfa",           
"log_AMC_EHPAD_totale", "log_AMC_ES_FQ", "log_AMC_ES_carba",                   "log_AMC_ES_totale", "log_AMC_ville_C3G", "log_AMC_ville_FQ", "log_AMC_ville_aminoglycosides", "log_AMC_ville_macrolides",          
"log_AMC_ville_penicillines", "log_AMC_ville_tetracyclines",       
"log_AMC_ville_tmp_sulfa", "log_AMC_ville_totale", "log_AMC_EHPAD_tot_except_FQ",     "log_AMC_ES_tot_except_FQ", "log_AMC_ville_tot_except_FQ", "EQI_st", "bac_ou_plus_20_64", "log_i041_pib_hab", "prop_travail_manuel",                "unemployement_pourc", "veto_by_AC", "veto_by_CV", "veto_by_carni",                   "prop_veto_50plus", "APL_medG", "medecin_hab", "prop_tabagisme",                     "tx_possession_chats", "tx_possession_chevaux", "tx_possession_chiens",              
"pop_14_moins_prop", "pop_3_moins_prop", "log_pop_density",                    "air_NO2_pop", "air_O3_pop", "air_PM10_pop", "air_PM25_pop", "resid_FQ_eau_naiades",   "dju_refroi", "log_i033b_part_class_5_eau_sup_pes", "log_UGB_density_SAU_bovine_all", "log_UGB_density_bovine_all", "log_UGB_density_bovins_adultes",     "log_UGB_density_livestock_tot", "log_UGB_density_porcs",              "log_UGB_density_veaux", "log_UGB_density_volailles" )

```

# Corrélations fonctionelles{.tabset} 

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}

cor.mtest <- function(mat, ...) {
    mat <- as.matrix(mat)
    n <- ncol(mat)
    p.mat<- matrix(NA, n, n)
    diag(p.mat) <- 0
    for (i in 1:(n - 1)) {
        for (j in (i + 1):n) {
            tmp <- cor.test(mat[, i], mat[, j], ...)
            p.mat[i, j] <- p.mat[j, i] <- tmp$p.value
        }
    }
  colnames(p.mat) <- rownames(p.mat) <- colnames(mat)
  p.mat
}

functional_correlation <- function(var, block, time_period, Nb.Base = 5){

## sélectionner le dataset avec que les variables explicatives
library(dplyr)
df.fc.ehpad <- dat[, which(colnames(dat) %in% c("region", "annee", var))]
df.fc.ehpad.amc <- df.fc.ehpad %>% 
  dplyr::filter(annee %in% time_period) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(annee = annee %>% factor, region = region %>%  factor)

col_block <- correspondance_block[correspondance_block$block == block,]$variable

df.fc.ehpad.amc <- df.fc.ehpad.amc[,which(colnames(df.fc.ehpad.amc) %in% c("region", "annee", col_block))]

# Paramètres
Temps      <- levels(df.fc.ehpad.amc$annee)
NbTemps    <- length(Temps)
VarName    <- colnames(df.fc.ehpad.amc)[-c(1:2)]
NbVar      <- length(VarName)
Regions    <- levels(df.fc.ehpad.amc$region)
NbRegions  <- length(Regions)
my_palette <- colorRampPalette(c("blue", "grey", "red"))

# Transformation des variables en matrice
mat.fc.ehpad.amc <- lapply(1:NbVar, function(p) as.matrix(reshape2:::dcast(df.fc.ehpad.amc, annee  ~ region, value.var = VarName[p])[, -1]))

# transformation en objet fonctionnel
# Base B-spline
Time.01      <- seq(0, 1, length.out = NbTemps)
spline.basis <- create.bspline.basis(rangeval = c(0, 1), nbasis = Nb.Base, norder = 3)
#plot(spline.basis, lty = 1, lwd = 2, main = "Base de B-splines", xlab = 'Temps')
# Projection des données dans la base
data.amc.fd <- lapply(1:NbVar, function(p) smooth.basis(Time.01, mat.fc.ehpad.amc[[p]], spline.basis)$fd)
# Format funData
data.amc.fun.uni  <- lapply(1:NbVar, function(p) funData(Time.01, t(mat.fc.ehpad.amc[[p]])))
data.amc.fun.mult <- multiFunData(data.amc.fun.uni)

# fcpa
fPCA.amc <-  lapply(1:NbVar, function(p){
print(p)
MFPCA::MFPCA(multiFunData(data.amc.fun.mult[[p]]), M = 2, uniExpansions = list(list(type = "splines1Dpen", k = 8)), fit = TRUE)})
# fPCA.amc <- lapply(1:NbVar, function(p) pca.fd(data.amc.fd[[p]], nharm = 2, centerfns = TRUE))
# récupérer les proportions de variances expliquées par PC1
propvar.amc <- c()
varname.amc <- c()
for (p in 1:NbVar){
  varname.amc <- c(varname.amc, VarName[p])
  propvar.amc <- c(propvar.amc, fPCA.amc[[p]]$varprop[1])
}

propvar <- cbind.data.frame(variable = varname.amc, 
                 proportion_explained_variance_PC1 = paste0(round(as.numeric(propvar.amc),2)*100, "%"))

# corr fonctionnelle moyennées par temps
cor.bivar <- array(NA, dim = c(NbTemps, NbTemps, NbVar, NbVar))
for (p in 1 : NbVar){
  for (p1 in 1 : NbVar){
    cor.bivar[, , p, p1] <- cor.fd(Time.01, data.amc.fd[[p]], Time.01, data.amc.fd[[p1]])
  }
}

cor.bivar.mean <- as.matrix(apply(cor.bivar, c(3, 4), FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE))
colnames(cor.bivar.mean) <- rownames(cor.bivar.mean) <- VarName

# corr des premières composantes fonctionelles

sum.var <- sapply(1:NbVar, function(p) fPCA.amc[[p]]$scores[, 1, drop = F])
colnames(sum.var) <- VarName
rownames(sum.var) <- Regions

# Matrice de p-value de la corrélation
if (NbVar >1){
M <- cor(sum.var, method = "spearman")
p.mat <- cor.mtest(sum.var)

p.mat.fdr <- matrix(p.adjust(p.mat, method = "fdr"),
                    nrow = nrow(p.mat),
                    ncol = ncol(p.mat))
rownames(p.mat.fdr) <- colnames(p.mat.fdr) <- colnames(p.mat)

numbers <- matrix("", nrow(M), ncol(M))
numbers[p.mat.fdr <= 0.05] <- round(M[p.mat.fdr <= 0.05], 2)

return(list(propvar, cor.bivar.mean, M, p.mat, p.mat.fdr, numbers, sum.var))}

else{
  return(list(propvar, sum.var))
}

}


```

```{r, echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}

functional_correlation(var = selvar_AMR_EHPAD_FQ, 
                       block = "AMC", time_period = 2012:2023)

```
